# Functional Coverage Checklist: Applicant Dashboard

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, completeness, and clarity of functional requirements for the Applicant Dashboard.
**Created**: 2026-06-22
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)
**Status**: ✅ All checks passed after spec updates.

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 - Are the field-level validation rules fully specified for all mandatory payment request fields? [Completeness, Spec §Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK002 - Is the logic for generating the `PRF-YYYY-NNNNNN` sequence explicitly defined for edge cases like calendar year boundary? [Completeness, Spec §Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK003 - Are the constraints for breakdown line items explicitly defined for both minimum and maximum limits? [Completeness, Spec §Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK004 - Are error handling requirements defined for file upload failures (e.g., file too large, invalid format, network timeout)? [Completeness, Spec §Scenario 4]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 - Is the behavior for "relaxed validation" on Draft save versus "strict validation" on Manager submission unambiguously defined? [Clarity, Spec §Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK006 - Is the calculation logic for "Total Payment Amount" clearly defined as summing breakdown amounts without manual override? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013]
- [x] CHK007 - Are the criteria for selecting a "Target Manager" unambiguously stated? [Clarity, Spec §Scenario 2]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 - Do the allowed states for editing and submitting a payment request remain consistent between Scenario 3 and Scenario 6? [Consistency, Spec §Scenario 3, §Scenario 6]
- [x] CHK009 - Is the handling of "Receipt Present" consistently enforced between the radio button selection and actual file upload constraints? [Consistency, Spec §Scenario 2, §Scenario 3]

## Scenario Coverage & Edge Cases

- [x] CHK010 - Are requirements defined for partial data submission failures or network timeouts during form submission? [Coverage, Exception Flow]
- [x] CHK011 - Is the behavior specified for when a Manager selected in a Draft becomes inactive before the request is submitted? [Coverage, Edge Case]
- [x] CHK012 - Are requirements defined for resolving concurrency conflicts when two sessions edit the same rejected request? [Coverage, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK013 - Are requirements specified for zero-state scenarios on the dashboard (e.g., no requests exist)? [Coverage, Spec §Scenario 1]
- [x] CHK014 - Does the spec define what happens if the applicant attempts to delete a request that is no longer in `DRAFT` status due to a concurrent session? [Coverage, Edge Case]

## Traceability

- [x] CHK015 - Is a requirement ID scheme established and mapped to testable acceptance criteria? [Traceability]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
